body.title: Load-bearing files carry their doc in a top-of-file docstring, updated in the same diff
body.statement: Every load-bearing file opens with a docstring stating what it is and why it exists (CP3). A change that touches load-bearing behavior updates the primary file's docstring in the same diff — the doc travels with the code. No parallel doc trees: design intent that outgrows a docstring becomes an architecture/<subsystem>.json intention-point in the memory store, pointing back at the implementing files.
body.why: Parallel docs rot silently — the retired lab/ and design_docs/ trees are the scar tissue. A docstring is the one doc location a reader of the code cannot miss and a diff reviewer cannot skip.
